title: Verify IR invariants after a pass
description: Run the IR verifier (or implement invariant checks) after a transformation and report any malformed IR with the offending construct.
body: Use when checking that a pass left the IR well-formed. Actions: run the IR verifier after the transformation (or check invariants: single definitions in SSA, well-formed phi nodes, dominance, typed values, valid CFG edges) and report each violation with the function and instruction involved. Do not assume a pass preserved invariants because the compiler did not crash. This skill exposes capability only and reports findings; it must not alter passes without runtime permission. Validation signals include a clean verifier report after every transform. Risk boundary: a broken IR invariant left by one pass will miscompile in a later pass; treat any verifier violation as blocking and trace it to the producing pass.
